clusters.justification: These terms co-activate across anterior insulo-cingulate and amygdalar pathways, representing a macro-level functional domain dedicated to the generation, processing, and regulation of emotional states and valence.

These terms map onto frontostriatal and ventromedial prefrontal circuitry, bound together by the underlying computational axis of determining cost, predicting rewards, and translating subjective worth into goal-directed choices.

These terms robustly co-activate within the default mode network, united by a reliance on internally directed, abstract mental representations that construct both distinct personal identity and models of others' minds.
